title: Sam Williams (rugby league)
extract:
Sam Williams (born 18 March 1991) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer who last played as a halfback or five-eighth for the Canberra Raiders in the National Rugby League (NRL). In September 2025 Williams was announced as the new coach of the Northern Pride RLFC in the Queensland Cup after a poor season from the team.
He previously played for Canberra in two separate spells and the St. George Illawarra Dragons in the National Rugby League, and for the Catalans Dragons and Wakefield Trinity in the Super League.
